description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 30 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 1 min per day. His WakaTime activity was split across Java, Markdown, and other languages, with work spread across 5 projects. He had no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded.
